DP.517.0000:
Every so often, an Egg will be found
at the Pokémon Day Care.\f
And they’re found without anyone
knowing how they got there.\f
Is someone leaving them there?
DP.517.0001:
They say no one has ever seen
a Pokémon actually lay an Egg.\f
So, it hasn’t been proven that
Pokémon actually lay Eggs.
